title: Shmungus Resources
description: A resource pack for the mini game Its Shmungus Time on the AtriocSMP
body:
A resource pack for the mini game Its Shmungus Time on the AtriocSMP

Makes changes to books written by the account ShmungusTime and which version it shows is dependant on book title

Adds labels to Yellow Shulker Boxes named Foof and Pink Shulker Boxes named Jerry Can

Changes the Waystone Icon for Shmungus Land on the ASMP

Includes a few other easter eggs and has future plans to help with more Mini Games in future
